name: Guan Yu

skills.name: Rider of Triumph
skills.description: '''Normal Stance:''' Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance. '''Charge Stance:''' Enhances the next skill and Basic Attack.

skills.name: Heroic Charge
skills.description: '''Normal Stance:''' Deals damage to enemies within range. '''Charge Stance:''' Charges forward, knocking back enemies in his path while dealing damage.

skills.name: Soaring Green Dragon
skills.description: '''Normal Stance:''' Removes crowd control effects and gains Movement Speed. '''Charge Stance:''' Removes crowd control effects and leaps forward, knocking back enemies within the landing area and dealing damage.

skills.name: Razor Cavalry
skills.description: '''Normal Stance:''' Enhances himself, reducing the movement distance required to enter Charge stance. '''Charge Stance:''' Summons heavy cavalry that dash forward, dealing damage and knocking back enemies in their path.
